vocab.meaning: những năm tháng hình thành nhân cách
vocab.example: During my formative years, weekend road trips with my family were the highlight of my month.

vocab.meaning: cảm giác thoát ly thực tại
vocab.example: Staring out the window at the passing landscapes provided a wonderful sense of escapism for a curious child like me.

vocab.meaning: sự nhiệt huyết vô bờ bến
vocab.example: I used to hop into the backseat with boundless enthusiasm, eager to discover new destinations.
To be honest, I didn't always enjoy it because I was quite prone to motion sickness on long, winding roads.

vocab.meaning: tuyến đường có phong cảnh đẹp
vocab.example: My father always insisted on taking the scenic route, which made the journey much more captivating for us kids.

vocab.meaning: không gian chật hẹp/bị gò bó
vocab.example: Being stuck in a confined space for hours often led to playful bickering between me and my siblings.

vocab.meaning: gợi lại ký ức xa xưa/hoài niệm
vocab.example: The smell of old leather seats still manages to evoke nostalgia for the family trips of my youth.

vocab.meaning: những chuyến đi dài dằng dặc
vocab.example: Back then, even a two-hour drive felt like one of those interminable journeys that would never end.

vocab.meaning: những lần chuyển hướng/ghé ngang ngẫu hứng
vocab.example: We loved it when my parents made spontaneous detours to visit quirky roadside attractions or local parks.
Singing along to my parents' old cassette tapes in the car remains one of my most cherished memories.
